parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search payments by ID, external_payment_id, receiver wallet address, or disbursement name.

parameters.name: page_limit
parameters.description: Define how many results will be returned in the response.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Exact match on the status of the payment.

parameters.name: receiver_id
parameters.description: UUID that represents a receiver in the database

parameters.name: created_at_after
parameters.description: Only return payments that are created after this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: created_at_before
parameters.description: Only return payments that are created before this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD
